steps.title: Identify the shared action
steps.content: The examples show artists combining styles: Cruz incorporated Choctaw hymns into folk-pop, and Black Belt Eagle Scout combined powwow-style melodies with rock.

steps.title: Choose the blending word
steps.content: "Fuse" means combine distinct things into one, matching the artists' blending of Indigenous music with other styles. A means overstate, B means study, and D means obtain, so those choices do not describe the action. The answer is C.
